description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet with a light wood grain finish on the top, sides, and base, and smooth, matte white panels on the front. The cabinet stands on four angled legs, which are also finished in a light color, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The front features two large doors on either side and two central drawers, each with small, square metallic handles for easy access. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a flat top surface suitable for displaying decorative items or storing everyday objects. The construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with metal hardware for the handles and drawer mechanisms. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or residential entryways, offering both storage and style.
description: A modern, light wood and white sideboard cabinet with two doors, two central drawers, and angled legs, featuring a minimalist design and metallic handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large white doors and the flat top surface, with angled legs visible below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the light wood grain panel and the depth of the cabinet, with no visible doors or drawers.
description_view_2: Rear-front view highlighting two central drawers and two side doors, all with small metallic handles, and the full width of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other wood grain panel, mirroring view 1 with no visible doors or drawers.
